text.heading: Investigate Senator Aliyu’s allegation
text.p: SIR: The Lagos State chapter of the Action Congress lauds Senator Nuhu Aliyu for admitting the well-known fact that most members of the National Assembly are fraudsters who are undeserving of the hallowed chambers of the National Assembly. AC therefore calls for a full enquiry, headed by eminent and forthright Nigerians who are not members of the discredited assembly to ascertain the level of compromise done to the National Assembly and those among its members who are responsible for this damaging reputation.
There is no way the grave allegations raised by Senator Aliyu should be swept under the carpet and that Nigerians must lead the cleansing of the National Assembly.

It is a well-known fact that Nigerian democracy had long been hijacked by fraudulent characters that should be in jail and their dominance of the kind of politics we have had since 1999 fuels the false growth of the PDP and the reason why for the past eight years, this country has been grossly decimated by fraudsters masquerading as leaders while the citizenry suffer irredeemably from their indulgence.

We know that the prevalence of fraudsters in the country’s governance is the reason why leadership was reduced to one huge racket in the eight years former President Obasanjo supervised over the most bizarre despoliation of this country under the guise of governance. It was so bad that no sector of our national life was spared the brutal invasion of corruption such that nothing but fraud and scamming reigns in Nigeria presently.

The present crop of National Assembly members as the previous crop are not spared from this virus as more than 95 per cent of them never emerged through a credible electoral process but were forced down on Nigerian through the most horrible electoral fraud that has been employed to assault mankind. What more, at the hallowed chambers of the National Assembly sits the daughter of the former president, with a damning international 419 case hanging around her neck.

We are not surprised that the National Assembly is being woken to admit a reality almost every Nigerian knows because we believe that there is time for everything under the sun. The time for cooking frauds has gone and this is the time for judgment so every member of the National Assembly should clear his or her name from this damning self-implicating verdict.
Joe Igbokwe, Publicity Secretary, Lagos AC.
